caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and a distinctive, tall, spiky grey wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with framed photographs and clothing items, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" printed on it. A logo on the left side of the screen features the text "PODCAST" below a stylized image and the words "TALK JO". To the right, red text reads "GOSS TALK JOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expressions and head posture, while the camera angle and background elements remain static.
